heroHeadline: Stanford: China Has 'Nearly Erased' US AI Lead — Gap Now Just 39 Arena Points
heroSubtitle: Stanford AI Index 2026 (April 16) finds China closed the AI performance gap from 1,300 to just 39 benchmark points since 2023; Jensen Huang warns DeepSeek on Huawei chips would be 'horrible' while calling for chip sales to China; Q1 2026 EV exports surge 53% YoY; Congress report documents China's systematic chip smuggling campaign
footerNote: Data sourced from MIIT, BIS, Bloomberg, FT, SCMP, CSET, Nikkei Asia, TechInsights, DeepSeek, Huawei Annual Reports, TrendForce, US Trade Representative, CBP, China MOFCOM, Stanford HAI AI Index 2026, House Select Committee on CCP
